base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of green_hill_zone — a tile from 1991 sonic the hedgehog. Green Hill Zone — Acts 1-3. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Green Hill Zone — Acts 1-3; classic-Sonic grass-biome with checkered-dirt platforms + palm trees
